info.title: Motion Ecosystem API
info.description: API for participant and specialist workflows

put.summary: Enable, disable or configure the private gamification profile

post.summary: Create an inactive training plan draft
Acknowledge warning factors from the current assessment
Validate load and safety for a plan revision
Read plan revision workflow status and current assessment
Activate a validated plan revision
Deprecated V1 plan creation endpoint
Append an idempotent post-24h session response
Append an audited correction without changing execution history
Acknowledge, resolve or reopen an execution safety alert
Declare completion of an assigned planned session
Start or return the participant's active session attempt
Report a session barrier and receive deterministic, safe options
Qualify a declared execution for points
Publish an immutable point rule version
Rebuild the ranking projection from the point ledger
Append a point reversal without changing ledger history
Create a draft anatomical structure
Withdraw a published anatomical structure
Publish an immutable anatomical structure
Add an acyclic parent-child relation between draft structures

get.summary: List executions and alerts for a participant with an active relationship
Return only the authenticated participant's non-diagnostic safety inputs
List planned sessions assigned to the current participant
Get the signed-in participant's daily training agenda
Return private points and a non-medical ledger view
Search published exercise versions using explicitly allowed filters
Read a public detail projection of one published exercise version
